data.workflowName: Cinematic Short: A voluptuous Pitcher Plant femme fatale slowly dig

data.text:
[
  "A perfectly symmetrical wide shot of a voluptuous Pitcher Plant femme fatale sitting upright on
a pastel mustard velvet sofa in a retro 1950s living room. She wears a classic pearl necklace and a deadpan
expression, while her bulbous, fleshy botanical lower half slowly engulfs the torso of a man in a tailored suit.
Thick, translucent pink nectar drips from her petal-lips onto the pristine upholstery, creating a hyper-tactile, glossy

sheen.",
  "An extreme macro, ASMR-focused close-up of her vibrant botanical curves and the man
's dissolving body pressed together in a sticky, hypnotic embrace. Viscous, honey-like digestive enzymes ooze slowly
over wet plant-flesh, catching the warm, uncomfortably erotic cinematic lighting. In the soft-focus background

, her elegantly manicured human hand calmly sets a delicate porcelain teacup onto a matching pastel mustard saucer.",
  "A medium shot of the
femme fatale staring directly into the lens with a stoic 1950s housewife gaze, her voluptuous
pitcher-body glowing softly from the inside. Within her translucent, veiny stomach-pouch, the silhouette of her partner is peacefully dissolving into
a shimmering, viscous golden syrup. Glistening tendrils stroke his remaining arm with unsettling tenderness as thick beads of nectar cascade

down the symmetrical sofa cushions.",
  "A flawlessly symmetrical shot focusing on the femme fatale lounging comfortably on the pastel mustard sofa,
with only a single polished men's oxford shoe protruding from her glossy carnivorous bloom. She delicately dabs her wet, nectar-stained lips
with a pristine lace napkin, maintaining an impeccably polite and unbothered posture. The room is bathed in a

hypnotic vintage glow, emphasizing the hyper-tactile, sticky textures of the heavy syrup pooling perfectly at her feet."
]
